home.tagline: Connect with drivers and passengers at Universidad de Quindío. Share your ride, reduce costs, and travel together.

login.title: Welcome back
login.subtitle: Sign in to your account
login.verificationSent: Verification email sent — check your inbox.

register.title: Create account
register.subtitle: Join Ruta Compartida UQ
register.rolePassengerDesc: Search and book seats on available trips
register.roleDriverDesc: Publish trips and offer seats to passengers
register.privacyText: I have read and accept the
register.privacyDetail: (Colombia's Habeas Data law). My data will be used solely to manage carpooling services at Universidad de Quindío.
register.firstNameMin: First name must be at least 2 characters
register.lastNameMin: Last name must be at least 2 characters
register.passwordMin: Password must be at least 6 characters
register.privacyRequired: You must accept the privacy policy to continue

checkEmail.title: Check your inbox
checkEmail.sentTo: We sent a verification link to
checkEmail.clickLink: Click the link in the email to activate your account.
checkEmail.notReceived: Didn't receive it? Check your spam folder or
checkEmail.requestNew: request a new one from the login page

verifyEmail.noToken: No verification token found in the link.
verifyEmail.successDesc: Your account is now active. You can log in.

forgotPassword.title: Forgot your password?
forgotPassword.subtitle: Enter your email and we'll send you a reset link.
forgotPassword.sentDesc: If that email is registered, we sent a link to reset your password.

resetPassword.title: Set new password
resetPassword.subtitle: Choose a strong password for your account.
resetPassword.successDesc: Your password has been reset. You can now log in.
resetPassword.invalidLinkDesc: This reset link is missing a token. Please request a new one.
resetPassword.invalidLinkError: Invalid reset link. Please request a new one.
resetPassword.passwordMin: Password must be at least 8 characters

trips.availableTripsDesc: Find and book a seat for your next trip to or from UQ.
trips.noTripsDesc: Try adjusting your filters or check back later.

detail.notAccepting: This trip is no longer accepting reservations.

driverTrips.title: My Trips
driverTrips.subtitle: Manage the trips you have published.
driverTrips.noTripsDesc: Publish your first trip so passengers can book seats.
driverTrips.confirmStart: Start this trip? It will be marked as In Progress.
driverTrips.confirmComplete: Complete this trip? All confirmed reservations will be marked as completed.
driverTrips.confirmCancel: Cancel this trip? All pending reservations will be affected.

newTrip.title: New Trip
newTrip.subtitle: Fill in the details to publish your trip.

tripForm.noVehicles: You have no vehicles registered. Add one from the Vehicles page first.
tripForm.priceDecimal: Price must be a whole number of COP (no decimals)

vehicles.title: My Vehicles
vehicles.subtitle: Manage the vehicles you offer for trips.
vehicles.noVehiclesDesc: Add your first vehicle to start publishing trips.
vehicles.confirmRemove: Remove this vehicle? Trips using it may be affected.

reservations.title: My Reservations
reservations.subtitle: Track all your booked seats.
reservations.noReservationsDesc: Browse available trips and book your first seat.

newReservation.noTrip: No trip specified. Go back and select a trip.
newReservation.title: Reserve a Seat
newReservation.subtitle: Confirm how many seats you need.
newReservation.noSeatsLeft: There are no seats left on this trip.
newReservation.notAccepting: This trip is no longer accepting reservations.

reservationDetail.pendingPaymentNotice: Your seat is held. Complete the payment to confirm your reservation.
reservationDetail.paymentFailedNotice: The payment for this reservation was unsuccessful. Your seat has been released.
reservationDetail.confirmedNotice: Your reservation is confirmed. See you on the trip!
reservationDetail.confirmCancel: Are you sure you want to cancel this reservation?

tripReservations.title: Trip Reservations
tripReservations.noReservationsDesc: Passengers haven't booked seats on this trip yet.
tripReservations.confirmCancel: Cancel this reservation and release the seats?

payment.title: Complete Payment
payment.subtitle: Your seat is held until this payment is processed.
payment.securityNote: Your card data is tokenized securely by Mercado Pago. It never reaches our servers.
payment.noReservation: No reservation specified. Go back and try again.

approved.label: Approved
approved.title: Payment approved!
approved.desc: Your reservation is confirmed. See you on the trip.

pending.label: Pending
pending.title: Payment is being processed
pending.desc: We will update your reservation once the payment clears. This usually takes a few minutes.

rejected.label: Rejected
rejected.title: Payment was rejected
rejected.desc: The payment could not be processed. Please check your card details and try again.

cancelled.label: Cancelled
cancelled.title: Payment was cancelled
cancelled.desc: The payment was cancelled. Your seat has been released.

refunded.label: Refunded
refunded.title: Payment refunded
refunded.desc: The payment has been refunded to your original payment method.

pseResult.pendingDesc: We're waiting for your bank to confirm the transaction. This usually takes a few seconds.
pseResult.confirmedDesc: Your reservation is confirmed. See you on the road!
pseResult.failedDesc: The bank declined or cancelled the transaction. Your seat has been released.
pseResult.timeoutDesc: We couldn't confirm the status yet. PSE payments can take a few minutes. Check your reservations shortly — it will update automatically.
pseResult.noReservationId: No reservation ID found in the URL.

trips.title: All Trips
trips.subtitle: {n} trip on the platform
trips.confirmCancel: Cancel this trip? Passengers will be notified.

users.title: Users
users.subtitle: Registered platform users.
users.comingSoonDesc: This requires the admin user-management endpoint (Backend Phase 8).

refunds.title: My Refunds
refunds.subtitle: Refund history for cancelled trips.
refunds.noRefundsDesc: You have no refunds on record.
refunds.confirmDesc: A refund of {amount} will be sent to your original payment method. This may take 3–10 business days.
refunds.alreadyRequested: A refund has already been requested for this reservation.

ui.errorMessage: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.
